items.title: FA Cup heroes Macclesfield make memories to last a lifetime
items.summary: Macclesfield's FA Cup odyssey may have ended against Brentford but they have made memories to last a lifetime, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

items.summary: De spelers van Barcelona hebben twee dagen vrij gekregen na de nederlaag tegen Girona. Volgens trainer Hansi Flick hebben ze rust nodig om beter voor de dag te komen in de wedstrijden die nog komen gaan.

items.title: FA Cup: Wrexham to host Chelsea in fifth round
items.summary: Wrexham will host Chelsea in the fifth round of the FA Cup.

items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique said he will not allow any player to be bigger than the club ahead of Tuesday's Champions League knockout phase playoff first leg against AS Monaco.

items.title: Yamal misses pen as BarГ§a fail to catch Madrid
items.summary: Barcelona were unable to return to the top of the LaLiga table after Fran Beltran's late winner sealed a 2-1 victory for Girona.

items.title: Haji Wright hat trick puts Coventry top of table
items.summary: Haji Wright hit a hat trick as Coventry returned to the top of the Sky Bet Championship with a 3-1 home victory over in-form promotion rivals Middlesbrough.

items.summary: Man Utd consider swoop for Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister, Man City not keen on James Trafford sale, Nicolas Jackson to return to Chelsea from Bayern Munich.

items.title: Barcelona verspeelt koppositie met derbynederlaag bij Girona
items.summary: Barcelona heeft maandagavond zijn vierde competitienederlaag van het seizoen geleden. Vlak voor tijd ging het voor de ploeg van Hansi Flick mis in de derby tegen Girona. Real Madrid gaat nu alleen aan kop in La Liga.

items.title: Wright hat-trick FIRES Coventry back to top of Championship!
items.summary: Highlights of the Sky Bet Championship clash between Coventry City and Middlesbrough.

items.title: Haji Wright hat-trick sinks Middlesbrough and returns Coventry to Championship summit
items.summary: вЂњWe are top of the league,вЂќ sang the Coventry City supporters of returning to the summit of the Championship. Ironically, it was a result that quelled the nagging noise surrounding Frank Lampard and his team. Coventry, pace-setters for the majority of the season, had won just four league games since the end of November. But Haji Wright hit a timely hat-trick as Coventry again traded places with Middlesbrough, whose six-game winning run came to an abrupt halt. Riley McGree pulled a goal back midway through the second half but from the restart Boro conceded a penalty that allowed Wright to claim the match ball. CoventryвЂ™s lead may be a single point but this felt a significant victory вЂ“ psychologically as much as anything вЂ“ their having taken just 16 points from the previous available 39. Continue reading...

items.summary: Listen to the latest episode of the Sky Sports Golf Podcast as Nick Dougherty joins the show to reflect on Collin Morikawa's win at the Pebble Beach Pro-Am.

items.title: Lampard hails massive win as Coventry find form of old to sink Boro
items.summary: вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹вЂ‹It may only have been three points like any other, but in the context of this season it was a massive win for Coventry City and Frank Lampard.

items.title: 'Big players, big moments, big nights!' | Wright completes hat-trick from penalty spot
items.summary: Haji Wright completed his hat-trick for Coventry City from the penalty spot to put the Sky Blues 3-1 ahead against Middlesbrough in their Sky Bet Championship clash.

items.title: Cambuur klopt Jong Ajax in slotfase en hervat jacht op ADO
items.summary: SC Cambuur heeft de draad weer opgepakt in de Keuken Kampioen Divisie en het Jong Ajax van de debuterende trainer Oscar GarcГ­a verslagen. Het venijn zat in de staart, waarbij Cambuur als winnaar uit de bus kwam. Ook bij Jong FC Utrecht - Willem II viel de beslissing in de slotfase van de wedstrijd.

items.title: MacclesfieldвЂ™s fairytale FA Cup run ended by HeathcoteвЂ™s own goal against Brentford
items.summary: The standing ovation from the Macclesfield fans at full time was deserved. Their side may have lost 1-0 on the night, their dream FA Cup run coming to an end just when a lucrative trip to West HamвЂ™s В­London Stadium in the fifth round had veered into sight, but pride was the В­overriding emotion. Ultimately it had taken an В­unfortunate own goal from Sam Heathcote, a PE teacher plying his trade as a part-time footballer in the National League North, to nudge В­Premier League Brentford into the fifth round. Continue reading...

items.title: Eigen goal van gymleraar maakt einde aan FA Cup-sprookje Macclesfield
items.summary: Het FA Cup-avontuur van Macclesfield FC is maandagavond ten einde gekomen. De ploeg van het zesde niveau in de Engelse voetbalpiramide slaagde er bij momenten in om Premier League-club Brentford te laten bibberen, maar ging door een eigen doelpunt toch kopje onder. Brentford bekert door en treft nu West Ham United.

items.title: Sneijder: 'De ene keer excelleert Godts, de andere keer is het een drama'
items.summary: Hoewel Mika Godts clubtopscorer is van Ajax, is er volgens Wesley Sneijder nog veel werk aan de winkel. De oud-international vindt dat de Belg veel constanter moet worden.

items.title: Curry: England ready to attack Ireland - we have to be better
items.summary: Tom Curry admits England were "fighting with one hand behind our back" during Saturday's defeat to Scotland but insists the team is ready to mount a response against Ireland.

items.title: Will we see changes to first England squad in 2026?
items.summary: The Lionesses return to competitive action next month as their campaign to qualify for the 2027 Women's World Cup begins. So what changes could we see?
